free_text: Measurement of nuclide production cross sections for
proton-induced reactions on natTi and 93Nb at 0.8 and
3.0 GeV
The Graduate University for Advanced Studies
(SOKENDAI), Hayama
Beam intensity: 9.6e+13 protons for 75 s
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 0.28-g Ti and 2.4-g Nb in 25 x 25
x 0.1 mm3, respectively
Current transformer
Irradiated for 75 s
Rapid Cycling Synchrotron (RCS)
Total uncertainty
MA
